sigWerErrors.reason: 'sao kê' (bank statement) and 'sau kê' are not the same; 'sau kê' is not a valid phrase and changes the meaning significantly.
'cần' (need) and 'còn' (still/have) are different in meaning, which changes the intent of the sentence.
'chuyện' (matter/issue) and 'chức' (position/role) are unrelated, which makes the sentence incoherent.
